[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1010100 3
1 0100000 1
2 0000101 2
3 0000011 2
4 0000000 a
5 0000000 a
6 0000000 a
7 0000000 a

01 10 0100001 2
12 21 1000010 2
23 32 0000000 a match 4 5 6 7
34 43 0001000 1
45 54 1010001 3
56 65 0000001 1
67 76 0000001 1
70 07 0001001 2

02 20 0000000 a match 4 5 6 7
13 31 0100000 1 match 1
24 42 1010100 3 match 0
35 53 0100000 1 match 1
46 64 0000101 2 match 2
57 75 0000011 2 match 3
60 06 0000001 1
71 17 0000011 2 match 3

36 63 0000000 a match 4 5 6 7

50 05 0100001 2
61 16 0000001 1
72 27 0000010 1

37 73 0001000 1
